summary: Clean audience recording with excellent sound quality capturing a very good three‑night run.
review: The tape was recorded from the 10th row using a Yamaha mixer and combines two tapers’ feeds, resulting in an unusually clear audience source. Reviewers describe all three nights as "very, very good," making this a solid performance despite the lack of specific song highlights.

ai_rating.rationale: Single detailed five‑star review praises both the pristine audience recording and the overall quality of the shows, leading to a high rating but with low confidence due to limited sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded from row 10 on the right side of the aisle using a Yamaha mixer; combines two tapers' feeds, resulting in a clean copy with no dropout issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer notes that all three nights were "very, very good," indicating consistently strong performances throughout the show.
